top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.team_long_name
FROM Team t
JOIN Team_Attributes ta ON t.team_api_id = ta.team_api_id
WHERE ta.buildUpPlayPassing > (
    SELECT AVG(buildUpPlayPassing)
    FROM Team_Attributes
    WHERE date LIKE '2012%'
)
AND ta.date LIKE '2012%';

SELECT DISTINCT t.team_long_name
FROM Team t
JOIN Team_Attributes ta ON t.team_api_id = ta.team_api_id
WHERE ta.buildUpPlayPassing > (
    SELECT AVG(buildUpPlayPassing)
    FROM Team_Attributes
    WHERE strftime('%Y', date) = '2012'
)
AND strftime('%Y', ta.date) = '2012';

SELECT DISTINCT t.team_long_name
FROM Team t
JOIN Team_Attributes ta ON t.team_api_id = ta.team_api_id
WHERE ta.buildUpPlayPassing > (
    SELECT AVG(buildUpPlayPassing)
    FROM Team_Attributes
    WHERE date LIKE '2012%'
)
AND ta.date LIKE '2012%';

WITH avg_passing_2012 AS (
    SELECT AVG(buildUpPlayPassing) AS avg_passing
    FROM Team_Attributes
    WHERE date LIKE '2012%'
)
SELECT DISTINCT t.team_long_name
FROM Team t
JOIN Team_Attributes ta ON t.team_api_id = ta.team_api_id
CROSS JOIN avg_passing_2012 ap
WHERE ta.buildUpPlayPassing > ap.avg_passing
AND ta.date LIKE '2012%';

SELECT DISTINCT t.team_long_name
FROM Team t
INNER JOIN Team_Attributes ta ON t.team_api_id = ta.team_api_id
WHERE ta.buildUpPlayPassing > (
    SELECT AVG(buildUpPlayPassing)
    FROM Team_Attributes
    WHERE date BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2012-12-31'
)
AND ta.date BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2012-12-31';

SELECT DISTINCT t.team_long_name
FROM Team t
JOIN Team_Attributes ta ON t.team_api_id = ta.team_api_id
WHERE ta.buildUpPlayPassing > (
    SELECT AVG(buildUpPlayPassing)
    FROM Team_Attributes
    WHERE date LIKE '2012%'
)
AND ta.date LIKE '2012%';

WITH avg_passing_2012 AS (
    SELECT AVG(buildUpPlayPassing) AS avg_passing
    FROM Team_Attributes
    WHERE date LIKE '2012%'
)
SELECT DISTINCT t.team_long_name
FROM Team t
JOIN Team_Attributes ta ON t.team_api_id = ta.team_api_id
CROSS JOIN avg_passing_2012 ap
WHERE ta.buildUpPlayPassing > ap.avg_passing
AND ta.date LIKE '2012%';

SELECT DISTINCT t.team_long_name
FROM Team t
INNER JOIN Team_Attributes ta ON t.team_api_id = ta.team_api_id
WHERE ta.buildUpPlayPassing > (
    SELECT AVG(buildUpPlayPassing)
    FROM Team_Attributes
    WHERE date BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2012-12-31'
)
AND ta.date BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2012-12-31';

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.team_long_name
FROM Team t
JOIN Team_Attributes ta ON t.team_api_id = ta.team_api_id
WHERE ta.buildUpPlayPassing > (
    SELECT AVG(buildUpPlayPassing)
    FROM Team_Attributes
    WHERE date LIKE '2012%'
)
AND ta.date LIKE '2012%';
